headlines.title: Suspect in Correspondents' Dinner shooting identified
headlines.description: The man suspected of opening fire at officers during the White House Correspondents' Association dinner in Washington, D.C., on Saturday is a 31-year-old from Southern California, authorities said

headlines.title: Trump removed from the room at the White House Correspondents' Dinner
headlines.description: President Donald Trump and other high-ranking administration officials were abruptly evacuated from the room and authorities said one person was in custody following a shooting at the White House Correspondents' Association annual dinner Saturday night

headlines.title: What we know about the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting
headlines.description: An armed man exchanged gunfire with law enforcement after he rushed a security checkpoint at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner in Washington, D.C. on Saturday, authorities said, an event attended by President Donald Trump and high-ranking members of his administration.

headlines.title: Trump, Vance rushed off stage at Correspondents' Dinner
headlines.description: Trump, Vance rushed off stage at Correspondents' Dinner

headlines.title: Trump posts video showing suspect rush through security
headlines.description: Trump posts video showing suspect rush through security

headlines.title: Police say Correspondents' Dinner shooter was 'lone actor'
headlines.description: Police say Correspondents' Dinner shooter was 'lone actor'

headlines.title: Trump holds briefing at White House after WHCD evacuation
headlines.description: NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports from the White House briefing room following the evacuation of the White House Correspondents' Dinner due to gunshots.

headlines.title: Trump recalls hearing gunshots at WHCD
headlines.description: President Trump recalled the moment he heard gunshots at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner and was evacuated from the room.

headlines.title: Trump on why shootings happen around him
headlines.description: President Trump shares why he believes he's experienced multiple shootings: "The people that make the biggest impact, they're the ones that they go after."

headlines.title: Inside security at the White House Correspondents' Dinner
headlines.description: NBC News' Kelly O'Donnell breaks down the security situation at the White House Correspondents dinner, where President Trump was evacuated. The Secret Service says it is investigating a "shooting incident near the main magnetometer screening area" and that one person is in custody.

headlines.title: Trump says 'no country is immune' from violence
headlines.description: President Trump tells NBC News' Garrett Haake that "no country is immune" from violence after a shooting at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner.

headlines.title: Inside the WHCD after Trump's evacuation
headlines.description: NBC News' Kelly O'Donnell reports from inside the Washington Hilton, where President Trump was evacuated from the White House Correspondents Dinner.
